title: Girl sleeping (Sketch -- 11th grade Spanish class)
alt: I don't remember her name at all, but she fell asleep on the floor in front of me.
transcript: [Girl sleeping on her side, head to the left, facing away from view.]
explanation: This comic depicts a girl sleeping on the floor of Randall's 11th-grade Spanish class, presumably during a movie as shown in the original caption. The title text on xkcd.com explains that Randall didn't know her name, but she was sleeping on the floor, and so he decided to draw her. It is possible that Randall found the girl attractive, which would have motivated him to draw her.
